lines.en_lit: GEMARA: It was taught Rabbi Yishmael says The light flashed; Rabbi Akiva says: The light has risen, Naḥuma ben Apakshiyon says: even light in Hebron. Matya ben Shmuel says the appointed the lotteries says: The entire eastern sky is illuminated to Hebron. Rabbi Yehuda ben Beteira says The entire eastern sky is illuminated to Hebron and the entire nation has gone out, each and every person to his labor.
If so grown considerably lighter. to hire workers we are saying.
Rav Safra said: prayer of Abraham from when the walls blacken

Rav Yosef said: we arise and derive from Abraham? Rava said: tanna derived from Abraham’s and we do not derive from his As it was taught “And on the eighth day the flesh of his foreskin shall be circumcised” teaches that the entire day is suitable for circumcision. However, the vigilant are early mitzvot as it is stated “And Abraham arose early in the morning and saddled

Rather, Rava said: Rav Yosef, this is difficult for him, as we learned Passover eves occur on Shabbat eves, at six and a half hours and sacrificed at seven and a half hours. let us slaughter from when the walls blacken,

What is the difficulty? Perhaps the walls of the Temple blacken at six and a half because they are not perfectly aligned. Or, alternatively, different Abraham there was great astronomy [itztagninut] in his heart. Or, alternatively because he was an Elder and sat in a yeshiva, As Rabbi Ḥama, son of Rabbi Ḥanina, said: From the days of our ancestors, yeshiva never left them.

they were in Egypt a yeshiva with them, as it is stated: “Go and gather the Elders of Israel” they were in the desert, a yeshiva with them, as it is stated: “Gather for me seventy men from the Elders of Israel” Abraham our Patriarch an Elder and would sit in yeshiva, as it is stated: “And Abraham was old, advanced in years” Isaac our Patriarch was an Elder and sat in yeshiva, as it is stated: “And it came to pass when Isaac was old Jacob our Patriarch was an Elder and sat in yeshiva, as it is stated: “And Israel’s eyes were heavy with age”

Eliezer, servant of Abraham, was an Elder and sat in yeshiva, as it is stated: “And Abraham said to his servant, the elder of his household, who ruled over all he had” Rabbi Elazar said: he had mastery over the Torah of his master, “He is Damascus [Dammesek] Eliezer” Rabbi Elazar said: who draws [doleh] and gives drink [mashke] to others from his master’s Torah.

Rav said: Abraham our Patriarch fulfilled the entire Torah as it is stated: “Because [ekev] Abraham hearkened to My voice and kept Rav Shimi bar Ḥiyya said to Rav: And say seven mitzvot But isn’t there also circumcision And say the seven mitzvot and circumcision. said to him: If so, why do I My mitzvot and My Torah?
Rav said, and some say Rav Ashi Abraham our Patriarch fulfilled even the joining of cooked foods, as it is stated: My Torahs. one, the Written Torah, and one, the Oral Torah.

Matya ben Shmuel says Is the entire eastern sky illuminated even to Hebron? And he says: Yes. Who said yes? If we say that who is standing on the roof, he dream and interpret Rather, that who is standing on the ground From where does he know

If you wish, say that who is standing on the ground and if you wish, say that who is standing on the roof If you wish, say that who is standing on the roof said: The entire eastern sky is illuminated. And that who is standing on the ground said to him: even to Hebron? And he said to him: Yes.
And if you wish, say that who is standing on the ground said: Is the entire eastern sky illuminated? And he said to him: to Hebron? And he said to him: Yes,

And why did they need to this? And are mistaken Wasn’t it taught Rabbi says: A column of moon is not similar to a column of sun; a column of moon rises like a staff a column of sun diffuses to here and to there? the school of Rabbi Yishmael taught: was a cloudy day, and diffuses to here and to there, Rav Pappa said: Learn from this a cloudy day is a completely sunny
What are the ramifications to spreading hides Alternatively, to which Rava taught A woman neither knead in the sun nor with hot water in the sun.
Rav Naḥman said: The hazy of the sun is more damaging than the sun And your mnemonic the a jar of vinegar: Dazzling sunlight, is more harmful than sunlight. And your mnemonic is a drip;
